description_long: This is a pink vending machine with a weathered and slightly rusted exterior, featuring streaks of grime and rust marks, especially on the top and back surfaces. The front face is dominated by a large glass display window showcasing a variety of colorful canned and bottled drinks arranged in neat rows. To the right of the display is a black keypad and payment interface, while below the window is a rectangular product retrieval slot with a Japanese label. The left side of the machine has graffiti near the bottom, and the right side features a colorful flower cartoon and some Japanese text. The back is mostly plain with rust stains and two cartoonish eyes peeking from the bottom edge, giving it a playful touch despite its urban wear.
description: A weathered pink vending machine with a glass drink display, keypad, and playful graffiti and cartoon art on its sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display of drinks, keypad/payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view with visible graffiti near the bottom and streaks of rust and grime on the upper surface.
description_view_2: Back view with prominent rust stains and two cartoon eyes at the bottom, otherwise plain.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a colorful flower cartoon, Japanese text, and some rust at the top.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right of the front face, featuring a black keypad and a small digital or printed area for instructions or information.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is integrated with the keypad on the front right, likely supporting coins and possibly bills or cards, with visible slots and a numeric keypad.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with multiple buttons is present on the front right, arranged in a grid for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide rectangular retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front face, with a flap or door and a Japanese label above it.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes Japanese text above the retrieval slot, a colorful flower cartoon with 'D-2' on the right side, graffiti on the left, and cartoon eyes on the back; no large commercial logos are visible.
